name: Citrus-Scented Sugar
directions: Fill jars with sugar to a depth of 1/2-inch.
Add some of the citrus peel, then cover with another layer of sugar.
Continue in this way, ending with the sugar about 1/4-inch from the top of the jar.
Replace lid.
Allow to sit for a few days so the citrus flavor infuses the sugar.

name: Citrus Sesame Salad
directions: Blend together yogurt, peanut butter& honey.
Line 8 plates with butter lettuce.
Arrange fruit over lettuce.
Drizzle dressing over fruit.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds.

similar.name: Apricot, Berry, and Jicama Salad with Honey-lime Dressing

name: Six Cup Salad ala Elvis
directions: Drain half the juice for the fruit Cocktail out and mix salad ingrdients.
Combine all dressing ingredients until fluffy, chill.
Serve salad with orange dressing.

name: Caviar & Avocado Appetizer
directions: Press the mashed avocado into the botton of a 8" or 9" pyrex pie plate.
Sprinkle the chopped onion over the avocado.
Combine the egg and Mayo.
Place gently over the onion.
Spoon the Caviar very gently on top.
Chill& serve with crisp sesame seed crackers or or small pumpernickel rounds.

name: Italian Spiced Olives
directions: Combine all ingredients except oil in a clean jar-shake gently, top with olive oil, shake again and store in the fridge for up to 1 month.

name: World's Best Waldorf Salad
directions: In a large bowl, sprinkle apples with 1 tablespoon lemon juice.
Add celery, grapes, walnuts, and raisins.
For dressing--------------.
combine mayonnaise and 1/2 tsp lemon juice.
Whip cream with sugar until fairly stiff.
Fold whipped cream into the mayonnaise mixture.
Mix with the apple mixture.
Sprinkle with nutmeg.
Chill at least one hour before serving.

similar.name: Apricot, Berry, and Jicama Salad with Honey-lime Dressing

name: Outback Steakhouse Orange Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small bowl, whisk well and chill 1 hour.

similar.name: Lemon Dill Coating Mix for Fish or Chicken

name: Polynesian Marinade
directions: Blend all the ingredients and pour the marinade over your chicken.
Marinate 4-24 hours in the refrigerator, turning pieces occasionally.

name: Guacamole with Sour Cream & Anchovy
directions: Combine all the ingredients, cover and chill.
Serve with corn chips or crackers.

name: Mango Salad
directions: I find the easiest way to cut up mango for this is to cut off as much as you can, slicing along the side of the pit.
You can tell what way the pit grows by its shape.
Score the mango halves lengthways, then crossways, into 3/4 inch cubes, going through to the skin, but not through it.
Turn the mango halves inside out and slice off the cubes.
Toss with remaining ingredients.
Goes well with any Thai or Indonesian dish.
Like Indonesian Ginger Chicken!
(recipe posted).

similar.name: Dreamy ,Yummy, Easy and Healthy Peachy(The 5 ending in Y!) Fruit

name: Adobo Marinade
directions: Mix all ingredients together and use on meats, chicken, tempeh, or fish.

name: Apricot, Berry, and Jicama Salad with Honey-lime Dressing
directions: Combine first 6 ingredients in large bowl.
Whisk lime juice, honey, and oil in small bowl to blend.
Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Pour dressing over fruit mixture; toss gently to coat.
Divide salad among 6 plates.
Sprinkle with sunflower seeds and serve.

name: Mango Velvet Layered Salad
directions: Pit and peel mangoes.
Cut into 1/2-inch cubes.
Measure 1/4 cup and reserve.
In blender or food processor, whirl remaining mangoes with the ginger, 3 tablespoons lime juice and 1 tablespoon sugar until smooth.
Taste and add more lime juice and sugar if desired.
Pour mango dressing into a deep 2 to 2-1/2 quart clear glass bowl.
Cut strawberries into 1/4-inch slices.
Peel bananas; cut diagonally into 1/4-inch slices.
In a bowl, gently mix bananas with 1/2 tablespoon lime juice.
Peel kiwi fruit; cut crosswise into 1/4-inch slices.
Peel, quarter, and core pear; cut into 1/4-inch thick slices.
In another bowl, gently mix pear with 1/2 tablespoon lime juice.
In the deep glass bowl, arrange strawberry slices in an even layer on the mango dressing.
Arrange banana slices on strawberries, and cover bananas with kiwi fruit.
Mound reserved mango and pear on kiwi fruit.
To serve, gently mix fruit with mango dressing at the bottom and spoon onto plates.

name: Green Mango & Tomato Salad
directions: Peel& finely cube the mangos, place in a bowl.
Add remaining ingredients and toss.
Cover with plastc wrap& refrigerate until ready to serve, toss again& serve.

similar.name: Apricot, Berry, and Jicama Salad with Honey-lime Dressing

name: Cold Mango and Rum Soup (Sopa Fria De Mango Y Ron)
directions: Puree the mango in a blender or food processor, then pass through a sieve.
Combine the mango puree with the remaining ingredients, except the nutmeg.
Garnish with the nutmeg.

name: Sudanese Yogurt and Tahini Dip
directions: Mix together garlic, salt, black pepper, and tahini until smooth.
Add yogurt and lemon juice, a little at a time, mixing well after each addition, until it is like a thick cream.
Sprinkle with parsley and serve with chopped vegetables, and warm pita bread, if desired.

name: Tropical Soup
directions: Chill all ingredients for at least an hour before preparing.
Peel and seed the mango and cut into pieces.
Put the fruit, apple juice, milk, honey and cinnamon in a blender and puree.
Pour into serving bowls, add garnish of choice, and serve.

similar.name: Cold Mango and Rum Soup (Sopa Fria De Mango Y Ron)

name: Lemon Dill Coating Mix for Fish or Chicken
directions: Combine all ingredients in large zip-top heavy-duty plastic bag; seal bag, and shake well.
Store tightly sealed in refrigerator; shake well before each use.

name: Syrian Sweet-and-Sour Olives
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a 1-pint jar.
Cover and let stand in the refrigerator for at least 3 days and up to 3 months.
Serve at room temperature.

name: Ginger Lime Dip
directions: Stir all ingredients until well mixed.
Cover; chill.
Serve with fruit.

similar.name: Lemon Dill Coating Mix for Fish or Chicken

name: Dreamy ,Yummy, Easy and Healthy Peachy(The 5 ending in Y!) Fruit
directions: Combine all the fruit in a large salad bowl.
Add the pie filling.
Toss to coat.
Serve chilled.

similar.name: Apricot, Berry, and Jicama Salad with Honey-lime Dressing

name: Mango Salad
directions: Peel the mangoes with a vegetable peeler or small sharp knife and then slice the flexh off either side of the stone.
Cut into strips about 1cm thick.
Put in a bowl.
Mix together the rest of the ingredients and pour over the mango.
Toss lightly.

name: Honey And Orange Ham Glaze
directions: Place all ingredients in a food processor.
Blend until smooth.
Rub onto a fully cooked ham and heat according to the package instructions for the weight.
Baste often.

similar.name: Lemon Dill Coating Mix for Fish or Chicken

name: Heavenly Fruit Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients well.
Chill and serve with favorite fruit (really yummy with apples).

name: Mexican Fruit Salad
directions: In a large bowl, combine kiwi, apples, grapes and cheese.
Combine honey and lime juice.
Toss gently with fruit mixture.
Serve on lettuce leaves if desired.

name: Special Gourmet Christmas Eggnog
directions: Beat the egg yolks until they are light.
Gradually beat in the sugar until the mixture is thick& light colored.
Beat the egg whites until stiff.
Pour the egg mizture into a punchbowl that is sitting in crushed ice.
Blend in the milk and the beaten cream (the cream should not be solid just half beaten so it is thick but not stiff) Slowly pour in the bourbon& Cognac.
Fold in the egg whites.
Sprinkle the punch with the 2 tbsp of dark rum.

similar.name: Cold Mango and Rum Soup (Sopa Fria De Mango Y Ron)

name: Versatile Orange Ice Cubes
directions: Mix the strained orange juice with water.
Add sugar to sweeten.
Stir until dissolved.
Place in an ice tray and use in orange-based beverages when ice cubes have formed.

Why I love this recipe is because it is so versatile- you can substitute orange juice with strawberry juice/apple juice/pear juice/peach juice/watermelon juice/raspberry juice/cranberry juice/blueberry juice/mango juice/grapefruit juice/your favourite juice- the list is endless!
In this way, you can create your own"flavoured" ice cubes and dip them in your favourite beverage!

name: Cranberry/Orange Relish
directions: Wash and drain cranberries.
Wash and quarter one orange and remove any seeds.
Place everything in a food processor and chop.
Add sugar.
Refrigerate overnight.

similar.name: Apricot, Berry, and Jicama Salad with Honey-lime Dressing
Dreamy ,Yummy, Easy and Healthy Peachy(The 5 ending in Y!) Fruit

name: Avocado Dip - Creamy and Delicious
directions: Scoop out all the avocado into bowl or directly into electric blenders bowl.
Add the mayonnaise.

Add the lemon juice until it's pretty much covering the avocado (i. e loads of lemon juice and bottled lemon can be better as it's even sharper), Add a LITTLE chilly pepper only (I prefer bottled hot pepper sauce like Tabasco), a pinch of salt, 2 pinches of pepper, and a few sprinklings of sugar to bring out the flavour.
Blend together in an electric mixer until it's smooth as silk, keep in fridge so it's very cool, and eat with chunks of carrot, chips (crisps in UK) and or spread onto toast etc.

name: Cola Marinade
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a glass bowl and combine.
The cola will lose most of its carbonation but that's OK.
Pour the marinade over beef or poultry in a shallow glass dish or heavy plastic bag.
Cover dish or seal bag and refrigerate for up to 3 hours for chicken and 6 hours for beef while marinating.
This recipe can be doubled or tripled.

name: Macedonian Fruit Salad
directions: Mix all ingredients, chill.
Serve.

name: Cherry "Olives"!
directions: Sterilize Pint sealers.
Pack each sealer with Cherries, leaving about 1 inch of stem on each.
To each sealer, add: 1 tablespoon salt, 1/2 cup white vinegar,"top-up" sealer with cold water.
Seal and store in a cool, dry place.
Store for at least 1 month, before using.

name: Carob Orange Balls
directions: Place pecans, walnuts, and dates in food processor and process until the mixture is ground fine.
Add honey, salt, vanilla, and orange zest to the nut and date mixture, and process until finely chopped.
Oil hands and roll mixture into quarter size balls.
Place carob powder on a plate and roll the balls in powder 2 times.

name: Lemon Garlic and Wine Marinade
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small bowl.
Pour the marinade over fish or poultry in a shallow glass dish or heavy plastic bag.
Cover dish or seal bag and refrigerate for up to 3 hours while marinating.

similar.name: Lemon Dill Coating Mix for Fish or Chicken

name: Homemade Peach and Brandy Face Mask
directions: Mash up a peach.
Put in a small bowl.
Add a tbsp of brandy.
Mix well.
Apply on damp face.
Leave it on for 20 minutes.
Rinse off.
Pat dry.
Pat dry.

similar.name: Apricot, Berry, and Jicama Salad with Honey-lime Dressing

name: Fruit Dip
directions: Mix and serve with fresh fruit.

name: Fresh Fruit Dip
directions: In a small bowl stir together the yogurt, applesauce, and cinnamon.
To serve, spear fruit with decorative picks and dip into yogurt mixture.

name: Cranberry-Orange Relish
directions: Drain juice from the ground fruits; reserve 3 cups of juice for the Jello.
Add the 1 cup of hot water to the Jello and stir until thoroughly dissolved, then add the reserved 3 cups of juice.
Mix well.
Mix all the fruits, sugar, Jello and walnuts together.
Chill in the refrigerator until set.
This relish will keep for at least a week in the refrigerator.
This will serve about 10 people.

similar.name: Apricot, Berry, and Jicama Salad with Honey-lime Dressing

name: Red Potato Salad
directions: In a very large pot, boil the red potatoes in salted water until tender but still firm (about 15 minutes).
Drain and set aside.
When cool, chop the potatoes.
In a saucepan, place the eggs in just enough cold water to cover them.
Cook for 13 minutes (water should just come to a boil).
Remove from heat and let eggs stand in the water for another 10 to 15 minutes.
Remove from water and cool.
Peel eggs and separate the yolks from the whites.
Chop egg whites and set aside.
Set the egg yolks aside.
In a frying pan, cook the bacon over medium heat until done.
Drain on a paper towel.
When cool, crumble and set aside.
In a large bowl, mix the red potatoes, egg whites, parsley and green onion.
In a blender, mix the egg yolks, mayonnaise, vinegar, salt and pepper.
Pour over the potato mixture.
Stir well until all ingredients are well blended.
Chill before serving.
Garnish with parsley.

name: Cranberry Fruit Relish
directions: Place cranberries, orange, and apple in blender; cover and process until chunky.
Transfer to bowl and stir in remaining ingredients.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.

similar.name: Apricot, Berry, and Jicama Salad with Honey-lime Dressing

name: Simply Guacamole
directions: Slice avocado lengthwise; remove pit and scoop avocado into a small bowl; add mayonnaise, lime juice, worcestershire sauce, hot pepper sauce, and salt; stir and mash the ingredients together (chunky guacamole takes less stirring and mashing while creamier guacamole takes more) until guacamole is preferred consistency; serve immediately, or cover and refrigerate if desired.
NOTE: Lemon juice may be substituted for the lime juice ~ You'll still get yummy guacamole!

name: Yemenite Charoset
directions: In a large bowl, combine the dates, figs, and wine. Add the sesame seeds, ginger, coriander, chili pepper, and matzoh meal and blend thoroughly. Roll into 1-inch balls or serve in a bowl.

name: Spicy Peach Salad
directions: Pit and slice the peaches.
Coarsely chop the cilantro.
Combine all ingredients and toss to mix.
Chill for at least 2-3 hours to blend flavors.

similar.name: Apricot, Berry, and Jicama Salad with Honey-lime Dressing
Dreamy ,Yummy, Easy and Healthy Peachy(The 5 ending in Y!) Fruit

name: Curried Avocado Dip
directions: Blend all ingredients except the avocado in a food processor until minced.
Scrape down the sides of the bowl to ensure even blending.
Add chopped avocado and blend until very smooth; taste for seasoning.
Chill until time to serve!

name: Prosciutto Wrapped Peaches
directions: Mix the chilli with the olive oil and set aside.
Take a peach wedge and a mozzarella chunk, and wrap a slice of prosciutto around the two.
Place three peach parcels on each plate, scatter with a few rocket leaves and drizzle everything with the chilli oil just before serving.

name: Wild Gooseberry and Plum Compote (Raw)
directions: You will need a food mill to remove the skins and seeds/pits from the fruit.
I have two circular metal sieve like inserts for my food mill.  I used the one with the small holes for the gooseberries and the one with the big holes for the plums.

Process the berries and plums into a dish or pot whatever you like, then add the Xylitol or sugar if you prefer.  But taste it after adding 1 tablespoons  It won't be super sweet or anything.  If you don't like it tart add more sweetener to suit your tastes.
Put in a tight sealing jar and store in the fridge.
Bon Appetit!

name: Aceitunas Aliñadas (Marinated Olives)
directions: Combine all ingredients, including the liquid from the can of olives, in a large jar (a 16-oz. Bell jar should suffice). Shake well to make sure the ingredients are well mixed, then cover and refrigerate for several days (up to a few weeks).
